title: Ticket to Paradise
writer: Jack Natteford, Nathanael West, David Silverstein
actors: Roger Pryor, Wendy Barrie, Claude Gillingwater
plot: Janes Forbes (Barrie) decides to help amnesiac Jack Doe (Pryor) to find the details of his true identity. She doesn't tell anyone she is leaving, which causes her worried father to hire a detective to find the pair. Trouble ensues...
